sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19647" key="battologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαττο-λογέω</orth>, <sense id="n19647.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βατταρίζω</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speak stammeringly, say the same thing over and over again,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Matt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg006:p.91D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Epict.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.91D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
